calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Distributing Remainder Interest In Real Property To Remainder Beneficiaries And Instructing Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Nelson for Yong Lin Yang (Guardian Ad Litem for Angela Ming Yang).

Mr. Nelson stated that the request for an accounting was dropped and presented an original order. The Court granted the petition (order for the same signed in open Court). The remaining issues are off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order Distributing Remainder Interest In Real Property To Remainder Beneficiaries And Instructing Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-17-2010 Continued To Dec-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Nelson for Yong Lin Yang.

Mr. Nelson stated that he was communicating with Trustee's Counsel Peter Bressler, that it looks like they are working things out and that he could submit a stipulation and a proposed order. The matter was continued to December 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Aguirre.
